ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lineages" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage */,
  "lineage_name" TEXT /* Name of the lineage */,
  "parent_lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent lineage (if applicable) */,
  "family" INTEGER /* Family to which the lineage belongs */,
  "main_spoligotype" TEXT /* Main spoligotype(s) of the lineage */,
  "rds" TEXT /* Unique regions of difference (RDs) associated with the lineage */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the lineage in the population */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the lineage */,
  "drug_resistance_profile" TEXT /* Drug resistance profile of the lineage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the lineage was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the lineage data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineages_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineages_parent_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "prevalence" INTEGER /* Prevalence of the family in the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the family was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the family data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoligotypes" (
  "spoligotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoligotype */,
  "spoligotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoligotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spoligotype */,
  "prevalence" INTEGER /* Prevalence of the spoligotype in the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the spoligotype was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the spoligotype data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spoligotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_of_difference" (
  "rd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region of difference */,
  "rd_name" TEXT /* Name of the region of difference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region of difference */,
  "prevalence" INTEGER /* Prevalence of the region of difference in the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region of difference was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region of difference data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineage_spoligotypes" (
  "lineage_spoligotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage-spoligotype relationship */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage */,
  "spoligotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spoligotype */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the spoligotype within the lineage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_spoligotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineage_spoligotypes_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineage_spoligotypes_spoligotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("spoligotype_id") REFERENCES spoligotypes ("spoligotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineage_rds" (
  "lineage_rd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage-RD relationship */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage */,
  "rd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region of difference */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the region of difference within the lineage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_rd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineage_rds_rd_id FOREIGN KEY ("rd_id") REFERENCES regions_of_difference ("rd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineage_rds_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the lineage data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the lineage data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Details of data downloaded (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
